Popular Lookups

令和7年 → 2025 令和6年 → 2024 令和5年 → 2023 令和4年 → 2022 令和3年 → 2021 昭和 → 西暦変換 平成 → 西暦変換 消費税 10% 計算

Frequently Asked Questions

  • What year is Reiwa 7?
    Reiwa 7 is 2025 in the Western calendar. The Reiwa era began on May 1, 2019, so to convert any Reiwa year to Western year, add 2018. Use the free Japanese era date converter on JapanCalc to convert any era year instantly.
  • What is Japan's consumption tax rate?
    Japan's standard consumption tax rate is 10%. A reduced rate of 8% applies to food and non-alcoholic beverages for takeout or delivery, and certain newspaper subscriptions. Use the free consumption tax calculator on JapanCalc to add or remove tax from any price instantly.
  • What is 満年齢 (man-nenrei) in Japan?
    満年齢 (man-nenrei) is the official Japanese age system, equivalent to the Western method. Age is 0 at birth and increases by 1 on each birthday. It is used on all Japanese official documents and forms. Use the Japanese age calculator on JapanCalc to calculate your 満年齢 instantly.
  • What zodiac sign is 2025 in Japan?

  • What is the current Japanese era?
    The current Japanese era is Reiwa (令和), which began on May 1, 2019, when Emperor Naruhito ascended to the Chrysanthemum Throne. Use the free era date converter on JapanCalc to convert any Japanese era date to Western calendar.
